prompt: Generate a Heisei-era retro purikura-style strip image of these characters making funny faces. Create a vertical 4-panel layout with funny faces in every frame. Include different expressions in each frame, with a slightly overexposed flash effect, nostalgic grainy quality, flashy graffiti, heart and star stamps, decorative text, and short Japanese messages to capture the 'uncool-but-cute' atmosphere of old photo booths.
